title: Ops Report As-of Readiness Validation
changes: Added asOfDate query param (defaults via resolveAsOfDate())
asOfReadiness contains: asOfDate, futureRowsDetected, futureRowsExcludedByGate, abnormalHistoricalRowsDetected, mvpUniverseTierSummary, readinessStatus, gateNote
futureRowsDetected: true when latest stockQuote.date > asOfDb
readinessStatus: WARN if future rows detected, PASS otherwise
